2603.21565.title: Rethinking SAR ATR: A Target-Aware Frequency-Spatial Enhancement Framework with Noise-Resilient Knowledge Guidance
2603.21565.paper_summary: Synthetic aperture radar automatic target recognition (SAR ATR) is of considerable importance in marine navigation and disaster monitoring. However, the coherent speckle noise inherent in SAR imagery often obscures salient target features, leading to degraded recognition accuracy and limited model generalization. To address this issue, this paper proposes a target-aware frequency-spatial enhancement framework with noise-resilient knowledge guidance (FSCE) for SAR target recognition. The proposed framework incorporates a frequency-spatial shallow feature adaptive enhancement (DSAF) module, which processes shallow features through spatial multi-scale convolution and frequency-domain wavelet convolution. In addition, a teacher-student learning paradigm combined with an online knowledge distillation method (KD) is employed to guide the student network to focus more effectively on target regions, thereby enhancing its robustness to high-noise backgrounds. Through the collaborative optimization of attention transfer and noise-resilient representation learning, the proposed approach significantly improves the stability of target recognition under noisy conditions. Based on the FSCE framework, two network architectures with different performance emphases are developed: lightweight DSAFNet-M and high-precision DSAFNet-L. Extensive experiments are conducted on the MSTAR, FUSARShip and OpenSARShip datasets. The results show that DSAFNet-L achieves competitive or superior performance compared with various methods on three datasets; DSAFNet-M significantly reduces the model complexity while maintaining comparable accuracy. These results indicate that the proposed FSCE framework exhibits strong cross-model generalization.
2603.21565.paper_summary_zh: 合成孔徑雷達自動目標識別（SAR ATR）在海洋導航和災害監測中具有相當重要的意義。<lb/>然而，SAR影像中固有的相干散斑噪聲常常遮蔽顯著的目標特徵，導致識別準確性下降和模型泛化能力有限。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，本文提出了一種具有抗噪聲知識指導的目標感知頻率-空間增強框架（FSCE）用於SAR目標識別。<lb/>所提出的框架包含一個頻率-空間淺層特徵自適應增強（DSAF）模塊，通過空間多尺度卷積和頻域小波卷積處理淺層特徵。<lb/>此外，結合在線知識蒸餾方法（KD）的師生學習範式被用來指導學生網絡更有效地專注於目標區域，從而增強其對高噪聲背景的穩健性。<lb/>通過注意力轉移和抗噪聲表示學習的協同優化，所提出的方法顯著提高了在噪聲條件下的目標識別穩定性。<lb/>基於FSCE框架，開發了兩種性能重點不同的網絡架構：輕量級的DSAFNet-M和高精度的DSAFNet-L。<lb/>在MSTAR、FUSARShip和OpenSARShip數據集上進行了廣泛的實驗。<lb/>結果顯示，DSAFNet-L在三個數據集上與各種方法相比達到了具有競爭力或更優的性能；而DSAFNet-M在保持可比準確性的同時顯著降低了模型的複雜性。<lb/>這些結果表明，所提出的FSCE框架展現出強大的跨模型泛化能力。
2603.21565.author: Yansong Lin et.al.
2603.21565.authors: Yansong Lin, Zihan Cheng, Jielei Wang, Guoming Lua, Zongyong Cui
